Name: Comprehension Intersect
Description: Intersects two arrays by matching a common field.

SettingsInputs.Name: SourceAddressA
SettingsInputs.Description: State address of the first array

SettingsInputs.Name: SourceAddressB
SettingsInputs.Description: State address of the second array

SettingsInputs.Name: MatchField
SettingsInputs.Description: Field name to match records on

SettingsInputs.Name: Destination
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to store the result
